74273.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-9-oleh-bezuhlyi-4413c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BVKp%2FdD5cQ3GHbgXv9kQRew%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3Iq183mFnTXYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq6umnmg~97-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq6umnmg-97
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-off rules the tape: Bitcoin's slide below $60K triggered roughly $10B in liquidations as capital rotates toward AI. Yet institutions are buying the dip and traditional finance keeps pouring into DeFi. 📉 Bitcoin's $10B Liquidation Wave Exposes the AI Capital Drain Bitcoin fell nearly 14% last week and dipped below $60,000 for the first time since October 2024, triggering almost $10 billion in long-futures liquidations as rebuilt leverage unwound. Analysts point to investor appetite rotating into the AI trade, sapping crypto momentum even as long-term allocators frame the drop as a discount worth accumulating. Read full story 🏦 Morpho Raises $175M at ~$2B Valuation to Bring Wall Street Onchain DeFi lending protocol Morpho secured $175 million in a round co-led by Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit Capital, with Apollo, Circle's venture unit and VanEck also taking part. The raise values Morpho near $2 billion and funds an open, blockchain-based credit network designed to connect decentralized finance with traditional institutions. More details ⚖️ 200+ Crypto Firms Press the Senate to Pass the CLARITY Act A coalition of more than 200 companies and groups urged Senate leaders to schedule a floor vote on the CLARITY Act before the midterms, seeking long-awaited regulatory certainty for digital assets. The lobbying push lands as Galaxy Digital trimmed its odds of passage to 60% with the August window tightening. Read more 🔓 Humanity Protocol Loses $36M After Multisig Keys Lived on One Laptop Humanity Protocol confirmed a $36 million bridge exploit traced to a single compromised laptop that held enough multisig keys to seize control of its bridges across two chains. The elementary security failure struck a startup backed by Pantera and Jump Crypto, renewing scrutiny of operational key management in DeFi. See details 🇯🇵 Japan's SBI Shinsei Bank to Pay Depositors in Bitcoin, Ether and XRP SBI Shinsei Bank launches a three-month pilot on June 10 letting its 4.33 million depositors convert vouchers worth 20% of their interest into Bitcoin, Ether or XRP through sister exchange SBI VC Trade. A successful run could make the crypto-rewards program a permanent offering this fall. Read full story 🌍 US Seizes $1B in Iranian Crypto as Israel Halts Strikes on Iran Washington seized roughly $1 billion in Iranian crypt

74267.subject: The biggest IPO ever found a home onchain
74267.body:
Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. DefiLlama maintains the deepest DeFi dataset in the world, and now we’re bringing you the most valuable onchain insights each week.

Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)



## SPCX IPO: Project Apex has retail investors in its sights

The SpaceX IPO, the largest IPO of all time, goes live on June 12th. 30% of the IPO is allocated to retail participants, compared to the usual 5-10% (though the total float at IPO is only 3%).

This is the first IPO eligible for Nasdaq index inclusion within 15 trading days. This rule change was specifically designed for SPCX and creates immediate passive buying.

“Project Apex” is the IPO codename, and lets the underwriters (big banks like Goldman, JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley etc) coordinate internally before the SEC filing goes live.

For those trading onchain, the pre-IPO has been live for weeks. Aside from the CBRS launch last month, this is one of the first IPOs with crypto-native price discovery mechanisms.

Here are the onchain venues where it can be traded:

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/80e34389-7c16-40d5-9a49-9937b0e79778/image.png?t=1780955450)
Follow image link: (https://x.com/DefiLlama/status/2064102130995069263?s=20)
Caption: 

[SPCX on trade[xyz]](https://defillama.com/rwa/perps/contract/xyz%3Aspcx) has seen over $500m in volume and earned $133k in protocol fees over the last 30 days. Open interest just hit a new high at $85m as the countdown inches closer to launch.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/44b9d395-5492-49fe-9ce3-b876b21ebcc0/xyz-spcx-market-metrics_2026-06-08.png?t=1780952583)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/rwa/perps/contract/xyz%3Aspcx)
Caption: 

The perp-implied valuation has fluctuated around $160 ($1.91t valuation), a 20% premium over the IPO price. This premium has compressed considerably from the $230 high in May.

SpaceX leads Pre-IPO open interest onchain.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8d6f7731-afe8-4699-bdb3-873cd6ac9d1b/image.png?t=1780953154)
Caption: 

Over 98% of Pre-IPO Perp OI happens on Hyperliquid through HIP-3 builder-deployed markets.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d1da231c-b0d2-4ab1-bc7c-4bf14ac999a0/pre-ipo-perp-oi-by-venue-trade-xyz-dominates_2026-06-08.png?t=1780953078)
Caption: 

Current SPCX premium implies a +$140b valuation gap that will need to resolve in just a few days. Either the perp will converge with reality, or reality will converge with the perp.





## Tide goes out on TVL and stablecoins

Total DeFi TVL fell by another 8% this week, from $79b to $72b, briefly dropping belo

74265.subject: Asteria Business Update 5/2026:Čísla, stratégia a príležitosti
74265.body:
Nová kariéra, aktuálne dáta, vplyv noviniek Wexo na biznis a stav Founders Packov.

Asteria Business Update 5/2026

📅 Utorok 16. 6. | ⏰ 20:00 | 💻 Online

Exkluzívny biznis briefing s obchodným riaditeľom Asteria

Juraj Farkaš vám otvorí dvere do sveta čísel, stratégie a príležitostí, ktoré práve teraz formujú budúcnosť Asteria. Žiadna teória – konkrétne čísla, jasné stratégie a reálne príležitosti, ktoré môžete využiť okamžite.

🎯 ČO VÁS ČAKÁ

🚀 Nová kariéra – kompletný pohľad na kariérny plán a ako z neho vyťažiť maximum
	📊 Pohľad na čísla – čo hovoria dáta a kam smerujeme
	💎 Čo znamenajú novinky Wexo pre váš biznis – ako premeniť produktové updaty na reálny príjem
	⏳ Founders Packy – koľko ich ešte zostáva? – posledná šanca byť pri tom od začiatku 

💡 PREČO TAM MUSÍTE BYŤ?

Toto nie je obyčajný webinár. Je to strategické stretnutie pre tých, ktorí to s biznisom myslia vážne. Dozviete sa informácie, ktoré vám poskytnú konkurenčnú výhodu a ukážu, ako maximalizovať svoj potenciál v Asteria práve teraz – kým je trh otvorený a príležitosti čerstvé.

Founders Packy sa nebudú predávať večne. Kto zaváha, prehráva.

👉 ZAREGISTRUJTE SA

Tento webinár by ste si nemali nechať ujsť, ak chcete vedieť, kam Asteria smeruje a ako z toho vyťažiť maximum.

Registrovať sa https://event.webinarjam.com/q3vw4/register/m47rvi0w

Tešíme sa na Vás,

Tím Asteria

https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61572533694926

https://www.instagram.com/myasteriagroup/

https://www.youtube.com/@MyAsteriaGroup

https://x.com/myasteriagroup

https://t.me/AsteriaNetwork

Asteria Network

22 Boulevard Plaza Tower 2, Dubai,
